lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, I sing of the Lord God.
All the desires of my mind have been perfectly fulfilled.
The True Guru has imparted this perfect wisdom. ||1||
Very fortunate are those who love the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Wealthy are those who have a discriminating intellect.
They are spiritual teachers, who meditate in remembrance on the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤਰੈ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis kai sang tarai sansaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Associating with them, we cross over the world-ocean. ||1||Pause||
Honorable are those who understand their own selves. ||2||
Noble are those who remember their Lord and Master in meditation.
By Guru's Grace, I have obtained the supreme status.
My bonds are broken, and my hopes are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਰਿਦ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਵਾਸਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har ke charan rid maeh nivaasaa |3|
lines.english: The Feet of the Lord now abide in my heart. ||3||
Day and night I meditate on the Glories of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jaa ke pooran karamaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, one whose karma is perfect
He himself is pure, and he sanctifies all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਆਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਸਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: so jan aaeaa prabh kee saranaa |
lines.english: that humble being enters the Sanctuary of God.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
His tongue chants the Name of the Lord, the Source of Nectar. ||4||35||48||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈਤ ਕਿਛੁ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: naam lait kichh bighan na laagai |
lines.english: Repeating the Naam, the Name of the Lord, no obstacles block the way.
Repeating the Naam, all pains vanish.
Listening to the Naam, the Messenger of Death runs far away.
Chanting the Naam, the Lord's Lotus Feet dwell within. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਕਿ ਰਸਕਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: rasak rasak har ke gun gaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord with loving affection and energy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਬਿਘਨ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਜੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nirabighan bhagat bhaj har har naau |
lines.english: Meditating, vibrating the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is unobstructed devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਦੈਤ ਦੇਉ ਨ ਪੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: har simarat dait deo na pohai |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, demons and ghosts shall not touch you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਗਰਭ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਰੁਧੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har simarat garabh jon na rudhai |2|
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, you shall not be consigned to the womb of reincarnation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਮੋਹੁ ਮਾਨੁ ਨ ਬਧੈ ॥
lines.translit: har simarat mohu maan na badhai |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, attachment and pride shall not bind you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਕਿਛੁ ਚਾਖੁ ਨ ਜੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: har simarat kichh chaakh na johai |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, the Eye of Death cannot see you.
Among the masses, only a few meditate in remembrance on the Lord.
Any time is a good time to meditate in remembrance on the Lord.
Chant the Name of the Lord in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਕਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਰੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: har ke naam kaa pooran rang |
lines.english: Perfect is the Love of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਾਪੈ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo jaapai tis kee gat hoe |3|
lines.english: Whoever meditates on Him is emancipated. ||3||
Social class or no social class, anyone may meditate on the Lord.
O God, shower Your Mercy on Nanak,
that he may think of you with each and every breath. ||4||36||49||
He Himself is the Shaastras, and He Himself is the Vedas.
He knows the secrets of each and every heart.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤਿ ਸਰੂਪ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸਭ ਵਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: jot saroop jaa kee sabh vath |
lines.english: He is the Embodiment of Light; all beings belong to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਰਾਧਹੁ ਦੁਸਮਨ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨੇਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal guramukh aaraadhahu dusaman dookh na aavai nere |1| rahaau |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, worship and adore His Lotus Feet; enemies and pains shall not even approach you. ||1||Pause||
The Creator, the Cause of causes, the Perfect All-powerful Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਓਟ ਗਹਹੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee ott gahahu man mere |
lines.english: Grab hold of the Support of God, O my mind.
He is the Uniter of Shiva and Shakti - mind and matter.
He Himself is the Essence of the forests and fields, and all the three worlds.
The universe is strung on His Thread.
He Himself is in the detachment of Nirvaanaa, and He Himself is the Enjoyer. ||2||
Without Him, there is no one at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤ ਕਤ ਪੇਖਉ ਤਤ ਤਤ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jat kat pekhau tat tat soe |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there He is.
Nanak sings His Glorious Praises in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤਿ ਭੁਗਤਿ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਵਸਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: mukat bhugat jugat vas jaa kai |
lines.english: Liberation, the ways and means of enjoyment and union are under His Control.
In the Love of the Naam, the world-ocean is crossed.
- O slave Nanak, that humble servant is blessed. ||4||37||50||
That person, with whom the Lord, in His Mercy, is pleased

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਣਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਨ ਤਾ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: aoonaa naahee kichh jan taa kai |
lines.english: His humble servant lacks nothing.
The minds of the Lord's devotee are filled with bliss.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
They become stable and permanent, and all their anxiety is gone.
